name: push-changes
description: Analyze the current diff against repo goals before pushing.

interface.shortDescription: Review the current diff against TODOs and plans
interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex slash command that analyzes the current diff, compares it to repo TODOs and plan docs, and summarizes how much progress the changes make toward a sprint goal or ad hoc task.
defaultPrompt: Compare this work against the TODO list
Summarize how much closer this gets us
